def truncate_number(number: float) -> float:
    return number % 1.0
HumanEval/132:
def is_nested(string):
    opening = [i for i, c in enumerate(string) if c == '[']
    closing = [i for i, c in enumerate(string) if c == ']']
    closing.reverse()
    cnt = 0
    i = 0
    l = len(closing)
    for idx in opening:
        if i < l and idx < closing[i]:
            cnt += 1
            i += 1
    return cnt >= 2
